title: New ClickFix Variant Uses Rundll32 and WebDAV to Evade PowerShell Detection

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - New ClickFix Variant Uses Rundll32 and WebDAV to Evade Power
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/01
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*data-x7-sync.neurosync*'
            - '*mer-forgea.sightup*'
            - '*verification.google*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
